$comment: Honua SDK samples gallery registry (epic honua-sdk-js#288). Honua-native grouping — content parity with Esri's reference coverage, NOT a clone of its structure/look. Each sample: id, title, blurb, href (live page or null for planned), tags, capabilities, state ('live' = runnable now, 'planned' = roadmap). The gallery (samples.html / gallery.js) renders groups in order and supports tag/text filtering. Live entries reuse existing honua.io demo pages and the shared assets/demo/layers.json contract against demo.honua.io.

groups.title: Get started
groups.blurb: First map, first query, first render — the smallest possible Honua app.

groups.title: Connect any service
groups.blurb: One protocol-neutral contract over 15 geospatial protocols. Honua's headline: the same query, any backend.

groups.title: Build the map
groups.blurb: MapLibre runtime, MapPackages, vector/raster sources, styling, and 2.5D/3D scenes.

groups.title: Explore & query
groups.blurb: Query expressions and linked map/table/chart/filter exploration over one shared context.

groups.title: Controls kit
groups.blurb: The @honua/sdk-js/web-components kit — drop-in legend, search, layer list, table, sketch, measure, editor, and more.

groups.title: Edit & collaborate
groups.blurb: Feature editing through open protocols (OData, OGC Features, WFS-T, gRPC) with optimistic updates and conflicts.

groups.title: Realtime & time
groups.blurb: Live feature streams, snapshot reconciliation, and temporal filtering.

groups.title: Imagery & terrain
groups.blurb: STAC discovery, COG/ImageServer rendering, Terrain-RGB elevation, swipe, and latency comparisons.

groups.title: Find places & routes
groups.blurb: Forward/reverse geocoding, typeahead suggestions, and routing.

groups.title: Analyze & process
groups.blurb: Spatial aggregation, indexed analytics widgets, and async geoprocessing / OGC Processes jobs.

groups.title: Migrate from Esri
groups.blurb: Esri-compat shims and the honua-migrate codemod — run ArcGIS JS API code on MapLibre. Unique to Honua.

samples.title: Quickstart: map + feature query
samples.blurb: Render a FeatureServer layer on a MapLibre map and run a linked query.

samples.title: Load a MapPackage / webmap
samples.blurb: Boot a map from a saved MapPackage with one call.

samples.title: Same data, three protocols
samples.blurb: One dataset queried through GeoServices REST, OGC API Features, and OData side by side — identical results.

samples.title: Universal service explorer
samples.blurb: A picker across every SDK protocol — FeatureServer, MapServer, ImageServer, OGC API, STAC, WFS/WMS/WMTS, OData, MapLibre-native — with capability/cache badges.

samples.title: Raster overlay + layer list
samples.blurb: Overlay a raster imagery lane (NAIP) on the vector base with a layer list and legend — the MapPackage layer model behind WMS/WMTS/ImageServer tiles.

samples.title: Interactive base + thematic layers
samples.blurb: Parcels, zoning, flood hazard, terrain, and imagery composed on one map.

samples.title: 2.5D buildings over terrain
samples.blurb: Overture building footprints extruded over 3DEP terrain through the scene runtime.

samples.title: Linked charts + map over OData
samples.blurb: Aggregations drive synced charts and a map with one exploration context.

samples.title: Query expressions (CQL2 / where)
samples.blurb: Build a protocol-neutral query expression and run it against a live FeatureServer; matches drive a feature table and highlight on the map.

samples.title: Full web-components kit
samples.blurb: Every control on one live map: layer list, legend, search, table, editor, chart, basemap, bookmarks, locate, measure, sketch, print/export, status.

samples.title: Legend, standalone
samples.blurb: A single <honua-legend> bound to a map's visible layers.

samples.title: Search / typeahead, standalone
samples.blurb: A single <honua-search> over feature attributes.

samples.title: Inspect & edit over OData
samples.blurb: Click a feature, change its status, watch the OData v4 PATCH — with optimistic updates and license-aware degradation.

samples.title: Realtime ops board
samples.blurb: Live incident streams (SSE), snapshot reconciliation, and dispatch geocoding in an EOC-style board.

samples.title: Imagery & terrain studio
samples.blurb: NAIP imagery, 3DEP hillshade/terrain, elevation profile, static-vs-live latency race, and a STAC browser.

samples.title: Geocoding: forward / reverse / suggest
samples.blurb: Address-to-point, point-to-address, and typeahead over a live Maui gazetteer, with a graceful bundled-fixture fallback.

samples.title: Indexed spatial analytics
samples.blurb: AOI-driven aggregation widgets (category, histogram, range, stat) over an indexed source.

samples.title: Geoprocessing / OGC Processes runner
samples.blurb: Browse the live OGC API Processes catalog, inspect a process input schema, and submit a real execution — with Community vs Pro (analytics.*) entitlement gating surfaced honestly.

samples.title: Esri-compat: stock Esri Leaflet, live
samples.blurb: Unmodified Esri Leaflet pointed at Honua's GeoServices surface — the migration story, running.

samples.title: honua-migrate codemod (before/after)
samples.blurb: Run ArcGIS JS API widget code on MapLibre via the esri-compat shims and the codemod.

samples.title: Planning & Permitting workbench
samples.blurb: Flagship mini-app: parcels + zoning + flood, query + editing + sketch/measure + print, with the full controls kit in one application.
